item.title: Behind the Veil: Darktrace's Detection of VPN Exploitation in SaaS Environments
item.description: A recent phishing attack compromised an internal email account, but Darktrace’s advanced AI quickly intervened. By identifying unusual activity across email and SaaS environments, Darktrace uncovered the attacker’s use of VPNs to mask their location and shut down the threat.

item.title: Balada Injector: Darktrace’s Investigation into the Malware Exploiting WordPress Vulnerabilities
item.description: This blog explores Darktrace’s detection of Balada Injector, a malware known to exploit vulnerabilities in WordPress to gain unauthorized access to networks. Darktrace was able to define numerous use-cases within customer environments which followed previously identified patterns of activity spikes across multiple weeks.

item.title: Lessons from the Capital One Breach on Cloud Security
item.description: Explore the implications of the Capital One breach on cloud security and strategies for improving your organization's defenses.

item.title: Stopping Trickbot: Darktrace's Autonomous Response
item.description: Darktrace's autonomous response successfully thwarted a Trickbot intrusion. See how AI played a crucial role in this defense.

item.title: Detecting Auto-Color: Linux Threat Guide
item.description: A case study of the Auto‑Color backdoor on Linux, covering indicators, behaviors, and recommended responses for teams. Learn more.

item.title: Defending Against Personalized Cyber Attacks
item.description: Stay informed about the latest trends in cyber threats with Darktrace experts, including how attacks are evolving and becoming more personalized.

item.title: Attack Trends: VIP Impersonation in the Business Hierarchy
item.description: VIP Impersonation occurs when a cyber-threat actor impersonates a prominent employee to obtain sensitive data. Learn all about VIP impersonation here.

item.title: The Rise of Alternative Access in Cloud Attacks
item.description: Understand the evolution of cloud-based attacks and the increasing use of alternative methods for initial access in cyber threats.

item.title: Atomic Stealer: Darktrace’s Investigation of a Growing macOS Threat
item.description: Atomic Stealer is rapidly emerging as a significant macOS threat, using infostealing and backdoor capabilities to target Apple users worldwide. Read a real-world story on how this threat was detected.

item.title: Darktrace Identifies APT35 in Pre-Infected State
item.description: Learn how Darktrace identified APT35 (Charming Kitten) in a pre-infected environment. Gain insights into the detection and mitigation of this threat.

item.title: AppleScript Abuse: Unpacking a macOS Phishing Campaign
item.description: A macOS phishing campaign using social engineering, AppleScript loaders, and TCC abuse – highlighting the growing shift toward exploiting user trust over software vulnerabilities.

item.title: Antigena Email Version 5: The Future of Email Protection
item.description: Version 5 of Antigena Email enhances security operations with AI-powered threat detection and intuitive reporting for busy security teams.

item.title: Transform Cloud Operations with Unified Real-Time CDR and Automated Investigations
item.description: Darktrace / CLOUD is delivering a truly unified approach to cloud security with automated cloud forensics and real-time CDR.

item.title: Zero-Day Trojan Attack Caught by Darktrace Appliance
item.description: Hear from a guest author how Darktrace spotted and neutralized a hidden zero-day trojan attack through our Breach Logs and Intrusion Detection System.

item.title: Amadey Info Stealer and N-Day Vulnerabilities
item.description: Understand the implications of the Amadey info stealer on cybersecurity and how it exploits N-day vulnerabilities for data theft.

item.title: AI Uncovered: Introducing Darktrace Incident Graph Evaluation for Security Threats (DIGEST)
item.description: Discover how Darktrace’s new DIGEST model enhances Cyber AI Analyst by using GNNs and RNNs to score and prioritize threats with expert-level precision before damage is done.

item.title: Unmasking Major Cyber-Threats of 2018
item.description: In the second installment of a 2-part series, Max Heinemeyer analyzes the rise of deceptive attacks & insider threats found by Darktrace AI in 2018.

item.title: Defending Tokyo Olympics: AI Neutralizes IoT Attack
item.description: Learn how Darktrace autonomously thwarted a cyber-attack on a national sporting body before the Tokyo Olympics in this detailed breakdown.

item.title: AI/LLM-Generated Malware Used to Exploit React2Shell
item.description: Darktrace identified an AI/LLM generated malware sample exploiting the React2Shell vulnerability within its Cloudypots environment. The incident shows how LLM‑assisted development enables low‑skill attackers to rapidly create effective exploitation tools.

item.title: Exploring AI Email Security & Human Behavior
item.description: Read how Darktrace AI is revolutionizing email security. Understand the human behavior of email attacks and how to mitigate your team's malware risks.

item.title: AI-Powered Cloud Security: Darktrace & Google
item.description: Discover how Darktrace uses AI and Google Packet Mirroring to enhance cloud security. Learn about their innovative immune system approach.

item.title: Defending Against the New Normal in Cybercrime: AI
item.description: This blog outlines research & data points on the evolving threat landscape, the impact of malicious AI, and why proactive cyber readiness is essential.

item.title: AI and Cybersecurity: Predictions for 2025
item.description: Discover the role of AI in shaping cybersecurity predictions for 2025 and how organizations can prepare for emerging threats.

item.title: Agent vs. Agentless Cloud Security: Why Deployment Methods Matter
item.description: Cloud security solutions can be deployed with agentless or agent-based approaches or use a combination of methods. Organizations must weigh which method applies best to the assets and data the tool will protect.

item.title: Darktrace / OT Product Updates | 2026
item.description: The Darktrace / OT release introduces new capabilities designed to help industrial organizations better understand, document, and operationalize their operational environments.

item.title: Cybersprint Attack Management Joins Darktrace
item.description: Learn how the addition of Cybersprint improves our attack surface management solutions, providing better visibility and security.

item.title: How Cactus Ransomware Was Detected and Stopped
item.description: Discover the tactics used to uncover a Cactus ransomware infection and the implications for cybersecurity defenses.

item.title: Compliance Threat: RedLine Information Stealer
item.description: Darktrace reveals the compliance risks posed by the RedLine information stealer. Read about their analysis and how to defend against this cyber threat.

item.title: Vidar Network: Analyzing a Prolific Info Stealer
item.description: Discover the latest insights on the Vidar network-based info stealer from our Darktrace experts and stay informed on cybersecurity threats.

item.title: Defending AITM Phishing and Mamba Attacks
item.description: Analyze the challenges posed by AITM phishing threats and Mamba 2FA, and discover how to safeguard your systems effectively.

item.title: Detecting & Investigating Lateral Movement
item.description: This guest-authored blog post examines an advanced cyber-threat discovered by Expel, using Darktrace, on a customer’s network.

item.title: Why St. Catharines Chose Darktrace for Digital Security
item.description: Discover why St. Catharines partnered with Darktrace to secure their digital assets and protect against cyber threats.

item.title: Modern Cyber War: Our Role in New Cyber-Attacks
item.description: Explore the roles we all play in the modern cyber war and how you can protect your digital assets in an evolving threat landscape.

item.title: New Botnet Utilizes IoT Drawing Pads for Attacks
item.description: Discover how a new botnet is utilizing IoT drawing pads for reflection attacks. Stay informed on evolving cyber security threats with Darktrace experts.

item.title: Qilin RaaS: Darktrace Detection Insights
item.description: Discover Qilin’s tactics and how to stop them. Get a checklist for responders. Read and strengthen defenses today.

item.title: 9 Stages of Ransomware & How AI Responds
item.description: Discover the 9 stages of ransomware attacks and how AI responds at each stage. Learn how you can protect your business from cyber threats.

item.title: 70 million in Cybersecurity Funding for Electric Cooperatives & Utilities
item.description: Discover how the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law and its $250M Rural and Municipal Utility Cybersecurity Program empower electric cooperatives and municipalities to strengthen cybersecurity. Learn how innovative tools like anomaly detection, IT/OT integration, and AI-driven solutions enhance resilience against modern threats.

item.title: Darktrace Detection of 3CX Supply Chain Attack
item.description: Explore how the 3CX supply chain compromise was uncovered, revealing key insights into the detection of sophisticated cyber threats.

item.title: Unraveling 2016 Election Tampering Controversy
item.description: While the 2016 U.S. election was roiled by fears over election tampering, it generated discussion on the intersection of cyber-security & voting.

item.title: Bridging SOC & IR with Automated Threat Investigations
item.description: Discover how Darktrace unifies SOC and IR teams with automated forensic investigations across hybrid environments, accelerating response and improving visibility.

item.title: AI-powered security for a rapidly growing grocery enterprise
7 MCP Risks CISO’s Should Consider and How to Prepare
item.description: As Model Context Protocol (MCP) becomes the control plane for autonomous AI agents, it creates a new and largely ungoverned security attack surface. This article outlines the key MCP risks CISOs must address and why governance and visibility are now essential.

item.title: AI Insider Threats: How Generative AI is Changing Insider Risk
item.description: The blog examines how AI has changed the paradigm of understanding, and dealing with, insider threats. It also explores a defense-in-depth approach and discusses what CISOs and SOC leaders can do to protect their organization from AI insider threats.

item.title: AI-driven SOCs power defense and business growth
item.description: How SOCs are using AI to become proactive, frontline defenders and strategic business enablers that drive resilience, innovation, and growth

item.title: CastleLoader & CastleRAT: Behind TAG150’s Modular Malware Delivery System
item.description: * AG-150, a MaaS operator active since March 2025, uses CastleLoader and CastleRAT in multi-stage attacks. Learn how Darktrace detected and blocked early attack activity.

item.title: Darktrace’s Detection of Unattributed Ransomware
item.description: Leveraging anomaly-based detection, we successfully identified an ongoing ransomware attack on the network of a customer and the activity that preceded it.

item.title: Anatomy of an Insider Breach From a Contractor's Laptop
item.description: Hear from a guest author how Darktrace identified an insider breach from a contractor's laptop, scanned the device, and removed the malware quickly.

item.title: Advancing the Use of Frontier AI in Cybersecurity: Darktrace Joins the OpenAI Daybreak Cyber Partner Program to Explore Defensive AI Integrations
The curious case of prompt language analysis
item.description: Prompt analysis is reshaping AI security. Learn why prompts are behavioral signals, not just text, and why context is critical to identifying real enterprise risk.

item.title: How security leaders are closing the AI governance gap
item.description: Why AI is introducing risks that legacy security models can't address and what organizations need to do to govern, secure, and confidently adopt AI at scale
